LanguageData.AmbrosiaAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to punga fruit. Long-term use causes neurological changes that make it difficult to function without regular consumption. Withdrawal is unpleasant, but the body can recover in time.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaAddiction.label: addicció al punga
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.description: Punga compounds in the bloodstream. They induce mild euphoria and ease tension, dulling the edge of daily hardship.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.label: punga calor
LanguageData.AmbrosiaTolerance.description: Una tolerància acumulada a la fruita punga. Com més severa sigui aquesta tolerància, més punga es necessita per obtenir el mateix efecte.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaTolerance.label: tolerància punga
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.description: Aquest colon va beure un còctel atòmic que tenia pungashine com un dels seus ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAsIngredient.label: va beure còctel atòmic a base de pungashine
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyInspiration.label: inspiració pungashine
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.description: Va consumir un bon còctel atòmic. Té l'oportunitat de proporcionar una inspiració aleatòria.
LanguageData.VBE_ConsumedCocktail.label: consumit còctel atòmic
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.description: Una ràfega de sucre d'una ampolla de sarsaparilla de cervesa casolana proporciona una durada curta. Proporciona un benefici de manipulació del 5% durant 5 hores.
LanguageData.VBE_DrankSoda.label: va beure sarsaparilla casolana
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.description: Una seqüela retardada desagradable del consum de guaranà.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkCrash.label: accident de guaranà
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.description: El guaranà restableix el descans immediatament i augmenta la velocitat de moviment, però sempre deixa un xoc enrere.
LanguageData.VBE_EnergyDrinkHigh.label: guaranà alt
LanguageData.VBE_GinAsIngredient.label: va beure còctel atòmic a base de ginebra
LanguageData.VBE_RBMeadAsIngredient.label: va beure còctel atòmic a base d'hidromel
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaAsIngredient.label: va beure còctel atòmic a base de tequila
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaAsIngredient.label: va beure còctel atòmic a base de vodka
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyAsIngredient.label: va beure còctel atòmic a base de whisky
LanguageData.VBE_WineAsIngredient.label: va beure còctel atòmic a base de vi
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedDigestibleResurrectorNanites: Una dosi d'aqua cura està activa en el torrent sanguini d'aquesta persona. Si moren mentre roman actiu, els nanits de reparació suspesos intentaran reconstruir-los al lloc.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSoySauce.description: Una salsa de nabius picant va afegir profunditat i dolçor a aquest menjar.
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedSoySauce.label: salsa de nabius consumida (del menjar)
LanguageData.VCE_ConsumedWasabi.label: arrel xander consumida (del menjar)
LanguageData.GravNausea.description: Intense nausea caused by sudden acceleration or violent deceleration aboard the Hellion.
LanguageData.GravNausea.label: flight sickness
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotTargetingUplink.description: Rep dades d'orientació d'un Eyebot proper.
LanguageData.RobCo_EyebotTargetingUplink.label: eyebot orientant l'enllaç ascendent
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineLiberatorUplink.descript: Rep un enllaç ascendent de combat d'una màquina de guerra propera.
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineLiberatorUplink.label: Enllaç amunt de la màquina de guerra
LanguageData.RobCo_WarMachineLiberatorUplink.stages.0: Enllaç amunt de la màquina de guerra
LanguageData.Chemshined.label: rot gut
LanguageData.DeathrestExhaustion.description: Severe exhaustion caused by prolonged Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.DeathrestExhaustion.label: Wendigo Shakes Exhaustion
LanguageData.GlucosoidRush.description: Metabolic activity is temporarily increased to fight the Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.GlucosoidRush.label: Glucosoid Rush
LanguageData.HemogenAmplified.description: Blood production is temporarily boosted to counteract the effects of the Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.HemogenAmplified.label: Hemogen Boost
LanguageData.InterruptedDeathrest.description: Recovery from the Wendigo Shakes was interrupted, worsening symptoms.
LanguageData.InterruptedDeathrest.label: Interrupted Recovery
LanguageData.PsychofluidRush.description: Mental stability is temporarily increased to resist the Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.PsychofluidRush.label: Psychofluid Rush
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_1.description: An unrefined FEV dosage is tearing through this subject's body in violent, uneven waves. Their metabolism surges, tissues misfire, and the mind slips toward paranoia and collapse while the mutation struggles to take hold.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_1.label: unstable FEV exposure
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_2.description: A refined FEV strain is restructuring this subject with far more control, but the process is still brutal. Violent mood swings, intrusive aggression, and bouts of instability are common until the body either stabilizes or fails.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_2.label: refined FEV exposure
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_3.description: An isolated FEV culture is remaking this subject at the deepest biological level. The transformation is faster and cleaner than lesser strains, but the nervous system remains under immense pressure until the final mutation locks into place.
LanguageData.WestTek_FEVMutationPending_3.label: isolated FEV exposure
LanguageData.VFED_Invisibility.description: A stealthboy cloak granted by the Stealthboy device. It affects nearby observers, making their brains unable to perceive this individual even if their eyes remain unaffected.
LanguageData.VFED_Invisibility.label: stealthboy cloak
